If anyone is wondering what the title is in reference to, it's a play on words. The original phrase is "Toby, or not Toby. 'That?' is the question". It was a really popular meme on 4chan back when they were making The Amazing Spider-man with Andrew Garfield. 
So, the creator of this video likely modified the text to fit in JD Vance (Republican Senator from Ohio) and Tim Walz (Ballroom Dancer from Wisconsin). Very funny effort, but I personally don't like political memes, so I will for sure watch this with a paper bag over my face. Sorry.
